home.hero.title: Unified Dashboard Suite for Student, Parent, and Staff Portals
home.hero.description: Built from the Contemporary Education Tech palette and the product roadmap's persona-query model. Each portal surfaces learning, attendance, communication, and finance signals in one role-specific interface.
dashboard.shell.title: Role-Based Dashboard Suite
dashboard.shell.experience_description: Built on the roadmap architecture: persona-driven queries, attendance and learning aggregation, communication alerts, and finance visibility from one consistent UX layer.
dashboard.shell.learning_pulse_descripti: Metrics aligned with roadmap dashboard aggregation contracts.
dashboard.shell.alerts_description: Prioritized from communication and event rules.

admissions.portal.application.title: Student application file
admissions.portal.application.descriptio: Manage {student}'s admissions journey for {school}, keep the family requirements on track, and stay ready for the next review milestone.
admissions.portal.application.family_not: No family notes have been added to this application yet.
admissions.portal.application.details_de: Open the supporting profile and admissions metadata for {student} only when you need it, without crowding the main flow.
admissions.portal.application.details_te: Keep the main page focused on the next admissions step. Open the student details only when you need the full profile or submission history.
admissions.portal.application.action_det: Admissions is ready to coordinate the first assessment slot for {student}.
Add the remaining file so the admissions review can continue without delay.
Finance is checking the latest transfer or card payment before the application advances.
admissions.portal.overview.title: Overview
admissions.portal.overview.heading: {student}'s admissions snapshot
admissions.portal.overview.description: This summary brings the profile, readiness, and current admissions stage into one place for the family.
admissions.portal.payment.title: Payment
admissions.portal.payment.heading: {student}'s payment details
admissions.portal.payment.description: Use this section to pay the admissions test fee, choose a payment method, and monitor verification before scheduling opens.
admissions.portal.payment.upload_descrip: After paying, share the transfer proof or transaction reference so admissions can unlock the next step quickly.
admissions.portal.payment.method.va_bca_: Recommended for instant bank transfer verification through the school billing partner.
admissions.portal.payment.method.manual_: Transfer from any bank and upload the proof so the admissions finance team can verify it.
admissions.portal.payment.method.card_de: Pay online with a card for the fastest family checkout flow.
admissions.portal.payment.helper.unpaid: This invoice is still waiting for your payment before admissions can move forward.
admissions.portal.payment.helper.pending: Finance has received the transaction and is confirming it against the student application.
admissions.portal.payment.helper.paid: Payment has been received and the application can continue to the next admissions stage.
admissions.portal.documents.title: Documents
admissions.portal.documents.heading: {student}'s document checklist
admissions.portal.documents.description: Admissions uses this checklist to verify identity, school history, and readiness before the file moves into final review.
admissions.portal.documents.help_descrip: Use the next upload step if a document is missing, outdated, or needs to be replaced for {student}.
admissions.portal.documents.helper.birth: Used to confirm student identity and age eligibility.
admissions.portal.documents.helper.paren: Used to verify the primary admissions contact for the family.
admissions.portal.documents.helper.repor: Helps the school understand recent academic readiness and placement context.
admissions.portal.documents.helper.stude: Needed for student profile creation and campus/security records.
admissions.portal.schedule.title: Schedule
admissions.portal.schedule.heading: {student}'s assessment schedule
admissions.portal.schedule.description: Choose and follow the admissions test schedule after payment clears so the file keeps moving.
admissions.portal.schedule.notes_descrip: If the slot no longer works for your family, contact admissions early so {student}'s review sequence stays intact.
admissions.portal.assessment.helper.not_: Choose the first available assessment or interview slot to continue the application.
admissions.portal.assessment.helper.sche: The admissions team has reserved the next available session and will send reminders to the family email.
admissions.portal.assessment.helper.comp: The assessment has finished and the application is now waiting for the admissions review outcome.
admissions.portal.assessment.result_help: Admissions is still finalizing the assessment outcome before the next file step is unlocked for {student}.
The assessment outcome is cleared, so the family can continue with the remaining admissions document requirements for {student}.
The assessment outcome is recorded as not passed. Admissions should review the result with the family before any document upload continues for {student}.
admissions.portal.decision_page.title: Decision
admissions.portal.decision_page.heading: {student}'s decision status
admissions.portal.decision_page.descript: This section shows whether the file is still under review, ready for an offer, or waiting for family confirmation.
admissions.portal.decision_page.next_ste: Admissions will keep this page updated after review, document verification, and assessment decisions are complete for {student}.
admissions.portal.decision_page.requirem: Keep payment, documents, and assessment follow-up complete so the final decision can be issued without delay.
admissions.portal.decision.helper.pendin: Admissions is still reviewing the full application and no final outcome has been released yet.
The admissions team is waiting for the remaining checklist items before releasing a final decision.
admissions.portal.decision.helper.offer_: The application has reached decision stage and the family can now review the next enrollment instructions.
admissions.portal.decision.helper.accept: The family has accepted the offer and the school has confirmed the seat for the upcoming intake.
admissions.portal.timeline.lead.title: Lead captured
admissions.portal.timeline.lead.detail: The original enquiry was saved and admissions opened a student application file.
admissions.portal.timeline.account.title: Parent portal activated
admissions.portal.timeline.account.detai: The parent account is verified and ready to manage the admissions journey online.
admissions.portal.timeline.application.d: Student profile details, school history, and target grade are now available for review.
admissions.portal.timeline.review.title: Admissions review
admissions.portal.timeline.review.detail: {student}'s file is currently being checked for readiness, completeness, and placement fit.
admissions.portal.timeline.offer.title: Offer preparation
admissions.portal.timeline.offer.detail: Once review finishes, admissions will prepare the next communication or offer outcome.
admissions.portal.timeline.enrollment.de: After the decision is released, the family can continue to enrollment confirmation and final onboarding.
admissions.portal.application.action_cen: This student file is currently centered on {stage}. Keep the next step moving so admissions can continue without guesswork.
admissions.portal.stage_tracker.title: Admissions path
admissions.portal.stage_tracker.descript: The file moves in a fixed order: child registered, test fee paid, schedule chosen, test passed, then documents uploaded.
admissions.portal.journey.title: Admissions flow
admissions.portal.journey.description: Keep this file moving in the right order for {student}: register the child, pay the admissions test fee, choose the test slot, wait for a passed result, then upload the required documents.
admissions.portal.journey.step.registrat: Student profile, school history, and target grade are already saved in the admissions file.
admissions.portal.journey.step.payment.d: Complete the admissions test payment first so scheduling can open for the family.
After payment clears, the family can confirm the most suitable admissions test slot.
admissions.portal.journey.step.result.de: A passed result is required before the document checklist unlocks.
admissions.portal.journey.step.result.wa: The test still needs to be completed and reviewed before the result step can unlock document upload.
admissions.portal.journey.step.documents: Required files only open after the student receives a passed test result.
The test requirement is cleared, so the family can now upload the remaining admissions documents.
admissions.portal.overview.readiness_hea: What is holding the file back
admissions.portal.overview.readiness_des: Parents should always be able to see which parts are complete, which parts are still in motion, and what will block the next admissions decision.
admissions.portal.payment.after_payment_: Scheduling opens after finance clears the test fee
Once the admissions test payment is accepted, the family can move straight into choosing the student's assessment slot.
admissions.portal.payment.methods_headin: Pick the most convenient payment path
admissions.portal.payment.due_context.du: Complete payment soon so the application can move into the next admissions step.
admissions.portal.payment.due_context.pe: Finance is already checking the transfer or card charge submitted by the family.
admissions.portal.payment.due_context.pa: Finance has cleared this invoice and the student file can continue moving.
admissions.portal.payment.line.registrat: Required before the student can book an admissions test slot.
admissions.portal.payment.line.assessmen: Covers reviewer allocation, session logistics, and family reminders once payment is cleared.
admissions.portal.payment.line.onboardin: Supports finance matching, reference tracking, and admissions follow-up after the transaction is sent.
admissions.portal.payment.update.invoice: Admissions generated the current invoice and linked it to this student application.
admissions.portal.payment.update.payment: The family still needs to complete payment or share valid proof of transfer.
A payment attempt has been captured and is attached to the student application.
admissions.portal.payment.update.finance: The finance team is actively checking the transaction and matching it to the invoice.
Finance has finished reviewing the payment and cleared it for admissions use.
Finance review will begin once the family submits payment or proof.
admissions.portal.payment.update.applica: With payment cleared, the student file can continue into the next admissions stage.
The file stays on hold until payment is accepted or verified.
admissions.portal.documents.support_desc: If a document is hard to provide, contact the admissions owner early so the file can be reviewed with the right context instead of stalling silently.
admissions.portal.documents.gate.title: Documents unlock only after the assessment is passed
admissions.portal.documents.gate.payment: Complete the assessment payment first. The document upload step stays locked until the test fee is paid for {student}.
Finance is still verifying the assessment payment. Document upload will unlock after that payment is cleared for {student}.
admissions.portal.documents.gate.assessm: The admissions assessment still needs to be booked and completed. Document upload stays locked until {student} passes the test.
The assessment is already scheduled, but document upload stays locked until the result is released and {student} passes the test.
The latest assessment result is marked as not passed, so new document upload stays locked for {student}.
Admissions is still confirming the assessment outcome. Document upload will unlock after {student} receives a passed result.
admissions.portal.schedule.gate.title: Assessment booking opens after the test payment is cleared
admissions.portal.schedule.gate.payment_: Pay the assessment fee first so admissions can open booking for {student}'s test slot.
The payment has been submitted and is still under finance review. Assessment booking will open after the test fee is verified for {student}.
admissions.portal.schedule.after_assessm: A passed result unlocks document upload
The admissions team will release the next document checklist only after the student's assessment result is confirmed as passed.
admissions.portal.schedule.slots_descrip: Pick the session that works best for your family, then confirm it with admissions so {student}'s test booking can be finalized.
admissions.portal.schedule.slots_helper: Preferred slots are held only after the admissions team confirms the booking.
admissions.portal.schedule.prep.device: Check the family device, camera, microphone, and internet connection before the slot begins.
admissions.portal.schedule.prep.document: Keep supporting documents and recent school context close during the call if the reviewer asks for them.
admissions.portal.schedule.prep.support: If the schedule no longer works, message admissions early to avoid losing the current review sequence.
admissions.portal.decision_page.readines: A final outcome is easier to release when payment, documents, and assessment follow-up are all clearly complete.

admissions.admin.summary.new_leads.helpe: Fresh enquiries waiting for first qualification.
admissions.admin.summary.review_ready.he: Student files with enough data for admissions review.

admissions.admin.summary.offers_today.he: Applications approaching final outcome and family follow-up.
admissions.admin.pipeline.title: Pipeline
admissions.admin.pipeline.heading: Admissions flow at a glance
admissions.admin.pipeline_detail.leads: Needs first review and contact assignment.
admissions.admin.pipeline_detail.documen: Waiting for document verification or family follow-up.
admissions.admin.pipeline_detail.assessm: Requires scheduling or review of completed sessions.
admissions.admin.pipeline_detail.offer: Close to decision and parent communication.

admissions.admin.queue.payments.helper: Finance items that still block application movement.

admissions.admin.queue.documents.helper: Applications missing files or waiting for verification.
admissions.admin.queue.decisions.title: Decision release
admissions.admin.queue.decisions.helper: Applications that are close to offer or final call.

admissions.admin.timeline.parent_calls.d: Call families with missing documents and unanswered payment notes.
admissions.admin.timeline.finance_checks: Review bank transfer proofs and update invoice statuses.
admissions.admin.timeline.assessment_syn: Confirm interview slots and completed reviewer notes.

theme_lab.title: Palette preview and QA controls
theme_lab.description: This route preserves the full branding palette system while public admissions screens stay locked to Option 2 with light and dark mode.
theme_lab.admissions_preview.title: Form treatment and CTA states
theme_lab.dashboard_preview.title: Surface, hero, and status tokens
theme_lab.dashboard_preview.description: Admissions and dashboards continue to share the same token source.

auth.login.title: Sign in to continue your family admissions process.
auth.login.description: Continue with Google or sign in using your admissions email and password. If needed, request a reset link.
auth.login.email_hint: Use the email you plan to use for the admissions account.
auth.login.password_hint: This phase is frontend-only. Any valid input signs in unless the mock repo blocks it.
auth.eoi.title: Register your child's interest.
auth.eoi.description: Share your initial details for admissions. We will email a secure setup link so you can continue the parent portal journey.
auth.eoi.success_page_title: Check your email for the next step.
auth.eoi.success_page_shell_description: Your enquiry has been received. We have prepared the next step for your admissions setup.
auth.eoi.success_page_description: We sent a follow-up email with the next instructions to continue your admissions journey.
auth.eoi.success_page_email_hint: We sent the message to {email}. If it is not in your inbox, check spam or promotions.
auth.eoi.success_page_generic_hint: If the message is not in your inbox, check spam or promotions.
auth.eoi.heard_from_label: How did you hear about the school
auth.reset.title: Request a new admissions login link.
auth.reset.description: Enter your admissions email to receive a secure setup/reset password link.
auth.reset.email_hint: We will send a secure setup/reset link to this email.
auth.setup.title: Review your registration details before WhatsApp verification.
auth.setup.description: Open the OTP step in a dedicated page, send the code to WhatsApp, then continue to account access setup.
auth.setup.start_hint: Continue to the next page and we will send the OTP to your WhatsApp automatically.
auth.setup.verify_step_hint: We send a 4-digit OTP to your WhatsApp when this page opens. Enter the code below once it arrives.
auth.setup.otp_hint: Enter the 4-digit code received on WhatsApp.
auth.setup.password_locked_hint: Password form will unlock after OTP is verified.
auth.setup.choose_method_hint: Continue with Google or set your own password.
auth.setup.redirecting_additional: Redirecting you to the additional admissions form.
auth.setup.missing_token: Setup token is missing. Please open the full link from your admissions email.
auth.setup.otp_page.title: Enter the OTP sent to your WhatsApp.
auth.setup.otp_page.description: This page sends the OTP automatically when it opens. Resend stays disabled for 60 seconds to avoid spam.
auth.setup.method.title: Choose how to access your account.
auth.setup.method.description: OTP is verified. Continue with Google or set your own password.
auth.setup.already_verified_hint: Your email has been verified. You can proceed to WhatsApp OTP verification.
auth.setup.verify_email_success: Email verified successfully. Redirecting to OTP verification...
auth.verification.error.missing_token_de: The setup token is missing from your URL. Please open the full link from the email we sent to your registered address.
auth.verification.error.empty_admission_: We couldn't find an admission record linked to your account. Please make sure you have completed the registration form first.
auth.verification.error.token_expired_de: Your verification link has expired. Please submit a new registration to receive a fresh setup link.
auth.verification.error.network_error_de: We couldn't reach the server to check your verification status. Please check your internet connection and try again.
auth.verification.error.verify_failed_de: Something went wrong while verifying your email. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
auth.google.success_description: Google authentication returned successfully. Final token/session exchange should be completed by backend integration.
auth.google.redirecting: Redirecting you to the next admissions step...
auth.logout.label: Log out
dashboard.parent.tests.book_ready_descri: Your fee is paid. Pick a slot from the schedule list — you'll get a confirmation with the test code to bring on the day.
dashboard.parent.tests.booked_descriptio: {student} has a confirmed test slot. You can check the details under "My tests" below.
auth.documents.title: Upload your child's documents
auth.documents.description: We need a few files to finalise the admission. Upload each document below — JPG/PNG/PDF, max 20 MB each.
auth.documents.empty_description: Once the admissions team approves your child's entrance test, they will open a document request and you will see it here.
dashboard.parent.docs.pending_descriptio: The admissions team is waiting on a few files to finalise this application. Please upload them at your earliest convenience.
dashboard.parent.docs.verified_descripti: {student}'s documents are approved. The admissions team will prepare an offer soon.
auth.booktest.title: Pick a test slot
auth.booktest.description: Your child's application is ready for the entrance test. Choose one of the slots below — you can't reschedule once booked, so pick a day that works.
auth.booktest.empty_description: There are no open test slots for this school right now. The admissions team will open more soon; you'll get an email when they do.
auth.booktest.missing_student: Missing student reference. Return to your dashboard and click the book-test CTA on a specific child.
auth.booktest.missing_school: Missing school reference. Return to your dashboard and try again.
auth.continue.title: Continuing your new application...
auth.continue.description: We noticed you already have an account. We are taking you straight to the next step — no need to set a password again.
auth.continue.checking: Verifying your link and opening the next step...
auth.continue.missing_params: This link is missing the token or admission reference. Please request a new link from the admissions form.
auth.continue.session_failed: We could not start your session. The link may have expired — please submit a new EOI.
auth.payment.title: Pay your registration fee to confirm your place.
auth.payment.description: This one-time registration fee secures your admission. You will be redirected to our secure payment partner Xendit to complete the payment.
auth.payment.fee_error: Could not load the registration fee. Please refresh the page and try again.
auth.payment.create_error: Could not start the payment. Please try again in a moment.
auth.payment.missing_admission: Missing admission reference. Please restart your setup from the link in your email.
auth.payment.return.paid_description: We are taking you to your parent dashboard...
auth.payment.return.pending_description: This usually takes a few seconds. We will refresh automatically — please do not close this page.
auth.payment.return.failed_description: If you believe this is a mistake, please refresh or try paying again.
auth.additional.metadata_title: Additional Admissions Details | Cybe Digital School
auth.additional.metadata_description: Complete the remaining admissions details after account setup.
auth.additional.title: Complete the remaining student information.
auth.additional.description: Your account access is ready. Review the EOI details below, then complete the extra admissions fields for each student.
auth.additional.context_hint: These details came from the EOI step and are carried forward automatically.
auth.additional.form_hint: Add the remaining admissions information for each student that was not collected in the EOI form.
auth.additional.student_section_hint: Complete the admissions details for this student.
auth.additional.student_card_error: This student still has fields that need attention.
auth.additional.student_notes_placeholde: Optional medical, learning, or scheduling notes for this student.
auth.additional.student_list_hint: Each student profile below came from the additional admissions form.
auth.additional.success_description: The admissions team can now continue with the next review step.
validation.eoi.whatsapp_format: WhatsApp number can contain only numbers, spaces, +, and -.
validation.eoi.has_existing_students_req: Select whether existing students are currently enrolled.
validation.eoi.children_count_integer: Children count must be a whole number.
validation.eoi.children_count_min: Children count must be at least 1.
validation.eoi.heard_from_required: Tell us how you heard about the school.
validation.eoi.school_required: Select the school campus for this admission.
validation.eoi.existing_children_count_r: Enter the number of children currently enrolled.
validation.setup.phone_required: Phone number is required to send OTP.
validation.setup.password_min: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
validation.setup.otp_invalid: OTP code is invalid. Please try again.
validation.additional.student_birth_date: Student date of birth is required.
response.login.locked: This account needs help from admissions before it can sign in.
response.login.success: Login accepted. Admissions dashboard access will connect in the next phase.
response.reset.not_found: No admissions account was found for this email.
response.eoi.exists: This email already has an admissions account.
response.eoi.success: Interest registered successfully. A setup link has been queued.
response.setup.expired: This setup link has expired. Please request a new link from admissions.
response.setup.otp_sent: OTP has been sent to your WhatsApp number.
response.setup.otp_verified: OTP verified successfully. You can now set your password.
response.setup.success: Your account is ready. Continue to the parent dashboard.
api.error.unable_to_process: Unable to process your request right now.
ui.not_found.title: We couldn't find that application
ui.not_found.description: The application you opened isn't linked to a child under your account. Pick one of your children below:
ui.not_found.no_students: We don't have any children on file for this account yet. Head back to the dashboard to add one.
ui.empty.leads.title: No leads match these filters
ui.empty.leads.description: Try widening the date range or clearing the status filter to see what's in flight.
ui.empty.applications.title: No applications in this view
ui.empty.applications.description: Adjust the filters above or move on to another stage — nothing is stuck here.
ui.empty.offers.title: No offers issued yet
ui.empty.offers.description: Offers will appear here the moment you generate one from an applicant's detail page.
ui.empty.doc_queue.title: Document queue is clear
ui.empty.doc_queue.description: Every uploaded document has been reviewed. Nice work.
ui.empty.enrolled.title: No enrolled students yet
ui.empty.enrolled.description: Enrolled students will show up once an offer is accepted and handed to SIS.
ui.empty.sections.title: No sections configured
ui.empty.sections.description: Create your first section to assign students and homeroom teachers.
ui.empty.audit.title: Audit log is empty
ui.empty.audit.description: Actions taken on leads, applications, and offers will show up here.
ui.empty.schedules.title: No test schedules yet
ui.empty.schedules.description: Create a schedule to publish test slots to parents.
parent.home.all_clear_body: No paperwork waiting, {name}. We'll nudge you here when something needs a parent.
parent.home.payment_reminder_body: Pay it now to keep your child's application moving.
parent.kids.title: {parent}'s kids
parent.kids.description: {count} child(ren) registered. Tap to open their admissions detail.
parent.kids.metadata_description: List of your children at school
parent.messages.title: Messages for {parent}
parent.messages.description: {count} message(s) from the school. Unread ones show a red dot.
parent.payments.title: {parent}'s invoices
parent.payments.paid_body: Thank you — this invoice is paid and on file.
parent.payments.pending_body: Please complete the payment so admissions can continue.
parent.payments.generic_body: Latest invoice detail for your family.
parent.payments.none_body: No active invoices. The school will send one when it is ready.
parent.stage_line.draft: Draft — let's finish the application for {name}.
parent.stage_line.submitted: {name}'s application is with the admissions team.
parent.stage_line.test_pending: {name} can book a test. Tap to pick a day.
parent.stage_line.test_scheduled: {name}'s test is booked. We'll remind you the day before.
parent.stage_line.test_completed: {name}'s test is done. Waiting for the result.
parent.stage_line.test_approved: {name} passed the test — let's upload their documents.
parent.stage_line.documents_pending: {name} still needs a few documents uploaded.
parent.stage_line.documents_verified: {name}'s documents are verified. Offer coming soon.
parent.stage_line.offer_issued: {name} has an offer waiting for you.
parent.detail.overview_lede: Here's everything about {name}'s admission. Tap a card below to take an action.
parent.detail.card.payment_body_unpaid: Pay {amount} to unlock the test booking.
parent.detail.card.schedule_body_none: Pick a day and time for {name}.
parent.detail.payment.method_va_body: Instant bank transfer through our billing partner.
parent.detail.payment.method_manual_body: Transfer from any bank and upload the receipt.
parent.detail.payment.method_card_body: Fastest checkout with any debit or credit card.
parent.detail.documents.headline: Upload {name}'s documents
parent.detail.documents.lede: Admissions needs these to finish the review. We accept photos or PDFs.
parent.detail.documents.locked_body: Once your invoice is paid we'll open uploads for {name}.
parent.detail.schedule.headline: Pick a day for {name}'s test
parent.detail.schedule.lede: Choose the time that works best for your family. You'll get a reminder the day before.
parent.detail.schedule.locked_body: As soon as we receive your payment, we'll unlock the test slots.
parent.detail.schedule.no_slots_body: We'll reach out as soon as new test days are published.
parent.detail.schedule.booked_body: {name} is all set for the test on {when}. We'll email you a reminder.
parent.detail.schedule.completed_body: Waiting for the result. We'll notify you the moment it lands.
parent.detail.decision.headline: {name}'s decision
parent.detail.decision.pending_body: Admissions will message you as soon as a decision lands.
parent.detail.decision.offer_body: Review and accept the offer for {name}.
parent.detail.decision.accepted_body: {name}'s seat is confirmed. See you at orientation!
parent.auth.login.title: Hi again 👋
parent.auth.login.lede: Sign in to check on your kids' admission.
student.home.headline: Welcome to your portal
student.home.lede: Your timetable, assignments, and teacher messages will show up here as soon as your school opens the student portal.
parent.error.cant_load_title: Something went wrong loading your family
parent.error.cant_load_body: We couldn't reach our admissions system. Please try again in a moment.
